title: festuca duriuscula var. rubra
intro: Festuca duriuscula var. rubra, also known as red fescue, is a variety of grass that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of red fescue include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Red fescue can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
